name: openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG maintains 2 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Talent and Service. The SIG has 6 core members and maintains 2 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-Talent-and-Service@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG maintains 2 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Talent-and-Service.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Talent-and-Service SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: Huilong Deng, Lichao Zhao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
